content:
Hello there and welcome! I am currently pursuing a Ph.D. degree in Statistics at the Department of Statistical Sciences, University of Padova, Italy. My doctoral research, under the fully enthusiastic and dedicated guidance of Professor Alberto Roverato, mainly focuses on the problems concerning model selection for graphical models for the large biological data. The full description for those who are interested is available in my attached curriculum vitea.
My research interests typically surround statistical learning and applied statistics, in particular, I would apply methodologies in machine learning together with statistical modelling to analyze and interpret the large and complex data sets, especially data relating to biology and genetics.
Every day, I immerse myself in research with peace and joy. I am a young and motivated researcher and I am on the path of building a scientific world of my own. It will definitely be an honor for me to be in any collaborative relationship.
summary: Hello there and welcome! I am currently pursuing a Ph.D. degree in Statistics at the Department of Statistical Sciences, University of Padova, Italy. My doctoral research, under the fully enthusiastic and dedicated guidance of Professor Alberto Roverato, mainly focuses on the problems concerning model selection for graphical models for the large biological data.
title: Dung Ngoc Nguyen
